subcodes.title: Ziyarat for the fifth to be martyred among the Letters of the Living
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God, my Lord, my Beloved, and my Heart's Desire! How can I begin to make mention of Thee and offer Thy praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک یا الهی و ربی و محبوبی و مقصودی کیف ابتدئن بذکرک و ثنائک
subcodes.subjects: @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @purpose; goal of creation
